main.summary: Shared reflection binding helpers used by reflection components.

method.name: IsCompatible
method.summary: Evaluate argument compatibility against a parameter type.
method.param: True when argument type exactly equals parameter type.
method.returns: True for exact or assignable compatibility; otherwise false.

method.name: CanAssignNull
method.summary: Determine whether null can be assigned to a given type.
method.returns: True for reference or nullable value type; otherwise false.

method.name: GetBindableType
method.summary: Normalize a parameter type for binding. Returns the element type for by-ref parameters; otherwise returns the parameter type unchanged.

method.name: IsOutParameter
method.summary: Determine whether a parameter is an out parameter (IsOut and IsByRef).
method.returns: True for out parameters; otherwise false.

method.name: IsRefParameter
method.summary: Determine whether a parameter is a ref parameter (IsByRef and not IsOut).
method.returns: True for ref parameters; otherwise false.

method.name: TryAutoFillOutParameter
method.summary: Create default invoke slot value for an unsupplied out parameter.
method.param: Element type of the out parameter (after by-ref normalization).
Auto-filled value output. Null for reference types and Nullable; default(T) for non-nullable value types.
method.returns: True when auto-fill succeeds; otherwise false.
